name: Color Picker
description: A checkbox lets the user select the value that is written in its corresponding text label. A user can select multiple checkboxes from a group at the same time.

tokens.16/Regular: Font(family: "SF Pro Text", style: Regular, size: 16, weight: 400, lineHeight: 1.5, letterSpacing: 0)
tokens.14/Regular: Font(family: "SF Pro Text", style: Regular, size: 14, weight: 400, lineHeight: 1.5, letterSpacing: 0)
